# Chinmay Arora | Portfolio & Venture Lab

> Summary: High-level overview of work spanning AI audit systems, GovTech product strategy, applied data science, research translation, and venture-oriented experimentation around trustworthy AI, public sector decision systems, and enterprise compliance tooling.

## Venture Pipeline (The Lab)

- [Aegis AI Strategy](/ideas/#lab): AI compliance infrastructure for enterprises that need faster audit preparation, policy cross-referencing, and governance-ready operating controls.
- [Public Infrastructure Copilot](/ideas/#lab): GovTech planning software that turns service requests, maintenance data, and neighborhood signals into ranked infrastructure investment decisions.
- [Compliance Twin](/ideas/#lab): A mid-market compliance graph product designed to map controls, evidence, and obligations into a traceable operating system.
- [Operator Memory Cloud](/ideas/#lab): A shared memory layer for startup teams that preserves decisions, workflows, and execution context across fast-moving workstreams.
- [Civic Procurement Graph](/ideas/#lab): Procurement intelligence software that organizes bids, contracts, vendors, and agency activity into a searchable public market map.
- [Research Commercialization Studio](/ideas/#lab): A venture-support workflow for turning academic research into commercialization briefs, prototypes, and institution-ready startup narratives.

## Research Archive (The Blog)

These posts provide the technical methodology for the ventures listed above.

- [Claude Memory changes the game — but the real unlock is portable, user-owned memory](/blog/)
- [Engineering Virality with Bayesian Optimization](/blog/)
- [Bayesian Optimization Meets Graphs](/blog/)
- [AI in Local Government DX: A Technical Deep Dive into Governance, Auditing, and Operationalization](/blog/)
- [Segmentation for Public Sector DX: From Lived Experience Signals to Safer AI Deployment](/blog/)
- [Welcome to the Blog](/blog/)

## Technical Skills

Python, React, Cloudflare Zero Trust, R, SQL, dbt, Pandas, NumPy, SciPy, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, TensorFlow, PyTorch, CV/NLP, LangChain, HuggingFace, ChromaDB, RAG, Text-to-SQL, Docker, FastAPI, CI/CD, MLflow, Supabase, Prometheus, Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, KPI design, storytelling, ArcGIS, QGIS, GeoPandas, ADI/SVI, spatial statistics
